name: Special Chocolate Chip Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 package DUNCAN HINES Chocolate Chip Cookie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cookie mix, contents of the buttery flavor packet from the Mix, egg, and water. Stir until thoroughly blended.
3. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
4. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes or until light golden brown. Cool 1 minute on the baking sheets. Remove to cooling racks. Cool completely.
5. Place chocolate candy coating in a small saucepan. Melt on low heat, stirring frequently until smooth.
6. To assemble, spread about 1/2 teaspoon of melted coating on the bottom of one cookie; top with a second cookie. Press together to make sandwiches. Repeat with remaining cookies.
7. Dip one-third of each sandwich cookie in the remaining melted coating and sprinkle with almonds. Place on cooling racks until the coating is set. Store between layers of waxed paper in airtight containers.
Makes 18 sandwich cookies.
